nodes.name: [SAFETY] Error → Preparar DLQ
nodes.notes: CONECTAR: Error Output do 'Salvar Interação' → Este node → INSERT DLQ

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO wa_dead_letter_queue (message_id, raw_payload, error_message, error_node, pipeline_stage)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.message_id }}',
  '{{ $json.raw_payload }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.error_message }}',
  '{{ $json.error_node }}',
  '{{ $json.pipeline_stage }}'
);

nodes.name: [SAFETY] INSERT DLQ
nodes.notes: Salva na Dead Letter Queue. Usa mesma credencial Postgres do Scraper v34.
